sections.heading: Document Overview
sections.content: The document is a Lease Agreement [86900ccabd38] for a residential tenancy, signed on March 15, 2024 [4f879e060157].

sections.heading: Parties Involved
sections.content: The parties involved are Rajesh Mehta, S/O Suresh Mehta (Landlord) and Ananya Sharma (Tenant) [cd1dbbdfe761].

sections.heading: Key Dates & Deadlines
sections.content: The commencement date is April 1, 2024, and the termination date is March 31, 2025 [162c4287aedc].

sections.heading: Financial Terms
sections.content: The monthly rent is Rs. 22,000/- and the security deposit is Rs. 66,000/- (three months' rent) [162c4287aedc].

sections.heading: Key Obligations & Clauses
sections.content: The tenant is responsible for minor repairs (below Rs. 500/-) and the landlord is responsible for major structural repairs [86900ccabd38]. The tenant shall not sublet or assign premises without written consent of the landlord [83a08fa9a4f0].

sections.heading: Flags & Risk Items
sections.content: Late payment attracts a penalty of Rs. 500/- per day [86900ccabd38].
